channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rays will play 19 of their first 22 games at home as MLB switches series to avoid summer rain
item.description: Major League Baseball switched a pair of series involving the Tampa Bay Rays to the first two months of the season in an attempt to avoid summer rain at open-air Steinbrenner Field, their temporary home following damage to Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn't attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 10 Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an IHSA state championship in Normal this week
item.description: Ten Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an Illinois High School Association state championship later this week in Normal. That includes two based in the city and two that will play each other for the state title in Class 8A, the IHSA's largest division.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Lightning host Avalanche for 'Hockey Fights Cancer' night
item.description: Although it's just another hockey game on the schedule for the lightning, tonight is bigger than that and means more than just the sport.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Two senators urge FIFA not to pick Saudi Arabia as 2034 host
item.description: Democrats Ron Wyden of Oregon and Dick Durbin of Illinois have told FIFA president Gianni Infantino in a letter “we urge you to seek out a host country with a record of upholding human rights.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: James Harden was about booed out of the arena each time he touched the ball, a sound of contempt not heard in Philly since — well, since Ben Simmons was razzed with much the same vocal voraciousness two nights earlier.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Caprock Academy Hockey plays first ever varsity game
item.description: The Caprock Academy Eagles -- featuring players from all five Valley schools (Grand Junction, Palisade, Fruita, Central and Caprock) -- kicked off their inaugural varsity season at the Jorgensen Event Center in Gunnison against Colorado Academy.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
